feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h
entry.content: Can we generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h , joining two table ACDOCA and CATSDB

entry.title: gCTS: parallel development on the same server
entry.content:
I am currently using SAP S/4HANA with gCTS on a single DEV server, and I am trying to understand whether parallel development on the same object is possible when using different Git branches.

My scenario is the following:

  • Two developers are working in the same DEV system.

  • Each developer is using a different Git branch in gCTS.

  • Both developers need to modify the same ABAP object (for example, the same class, program, or CDS view) for different features.

Since gCTS is Git-based and supports branching, I expected that each developer could work independently in their own branch without locking the object for the other developer. However, in practice, the SAP object locking/edit mechanism still seems to prevent parallel editing on the same system.

So my question is:

Is true parallel development of the same object possible with gCTS when both developers are working in the same SAP DEV server but on different Git branches?

Or does gCTS branching only work properly for parallel development if each branch is connected to a separate development system/environment?

If anyone has experience with this scenario or knows the recommended approach for enabling parallel development of the same object with gCTS, I would really appreciate the clarification.

entry.title: Force document-wide re-pricing on sales order total parent quantity with respect to a threshold valu
entry.content:
Hello experts,

is there a way to force document-wide re-pricing programmatically when the total order quantity (parent items, not children) changes with respect to a threshold value? I want to do this during order creation or modification (VA01, VA02 or called indirectly via BAPIs).

I tried numerous userexits in MV45AFZZ and MV45AFZB but I was not able to cover cases when, say, a new line item is entered. Re-pricing is invoked only for this line item.

System is SAP_ABAP 75I (S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023).

Regards,

Konstantinos

entry.title: Materials are getting skipped during MRP live(MD01N) run
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a custom table in which all the active materials are stored for MRP live planning. e.g. table contains 10K article(one plant).

We are calling MD01N(via background job) in the packet size of 1000 materials so MD01N job will be called 10 times.  We made the job call sequential so one by one job will be executed. 

Every time we see, despite all the jobs are successfully finished, some materials are getting skipped. The count of skipped materials varies but average 1000 materials are skipped.

Then we have to manually run the MD01N with the skipped articles and let's say 200 are processed. then again run with remaining 800 material then some more are processed and so on.

Any one encountered this issue ? Any suggestions where we can why materials are getting skipped?

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: BADI or User Exit for Routing
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Our requirement is to restrict the deletion of operations/activities in transaction code CA02.
Currently, users are able to delete routing operations through CA02. We want to control or prevent operation deletion.
Kindly suggest if there is any suitable BAdI or user exit available to achieve this requirement.

Advance Thanks.

entry.title: SYNTAX Error: "WNFLIN" is not type-compatible with formal parameter "IT_NF_ITEMS"
entry.content:
Include LJ1BGF01
    "WNFLIN" is not type-compatible with formal parameter "IT_NF_ITEMS"

entry.title: EML Get Permission from SAP BO ( Billing )
entry.content:
Hello,

I have developed a custom app on the public cloud ( developer extensibility ).

I use the I_BILLINGDOCUMENTTP-CreateFromExternalData action (SAP Business Accelerator Hub - I_BILLINGDOCUMENTTP)
Furthermore I have set up two roles, one being able to execute the function via the Sales-Billing Document catalog (user "write"), the other being only able to create data in my app but not trigger the function above (user "read").
(Billing Document | SAP Help Portal)
If the read user performs the action, the eml fails and i can catch the error. (so far so good)
My intention now is to check if he is allowed to use the action via the global features method and disable the button if he is not.

I know that there is the GET PERMISSION ONLY GLOBAL AUTHORIZATION .... feature, but it returns true for all inputs on my end.
If I check the SAP implementation of I_BillingDocument~CreateFromExternalData, i can see, that the global authtorization method is not implemented and instead works with authorization context.
I can see there and in the business catalog for "write" (SAP_BCR_SD_BIL_DOC_PC) the required authorization objects.
Some of the authorization objects are not cloud ready and therefore cannot be used.

So my question is:
How do I check if the user can use the CreateFromExternalData action without using it in the first place?

entry.title: COR1 - BADI OR USER EXIT FOR OPERATION CHANGES RESTRICTION
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement to prevent users from modifying operation values that are copied from routing during order creation (COR1).

I am using user exit PPCO0019 (Checks for Changes to Order Operations). The exit works as expected in COR2, because it is triggered after operation changes are made. However, in COR1, the exit is called before the user edits the operation values, which prevents me from validating the changes.

Is there any alternative user exit, BAdI, or enhancement that can be used in COR1 to validate or restrict operation changes during order creation.

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How to hide the custom form uibb in standard OVP FPM app?
entry.content:
Hi, 
i created a new form uibb like you cann see in the ss. (Inside OVP FPM app for Forwarding Orders)

My requirement is, to be able to hide it when there is no selection in Business Partners uibb list. (above header uibb).
How can i do this?

This custom uibb was added right next to an existing tabbed uibb. You can see both in below ss.

Regards

entry.title: Connection between BTP to On Premises ERP not working
entry.content:
Hello, i am connecting my on premises system to BAS.
1. Cloud connector setup is done and connection is fine between cloud connector and On premises system . on checking connection it says - "Backend is reachable from cloud connector".

2. Configures on premises system from BAS, entered all the variables like WebIDEUsage, WebIDEEnabled, HTML5.DynamicDestination, HTML5.Timeout

3. Getting below error when opening ON premises system from BAS - "

Could not get v2 and v4 services."
4. /IWFND/CONFIG is published in /n/IWFND/V4_ADMIN
5. Tcode- /n /IWFND/ERROR_LOG is showing error - Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered
6. While accessing url - https:///sap/opu/odata4/iwfnd/config/default/iwfnd/catalog/0002/ServiceGroups?$expand=DefaultSystem($expand=Services)
getting error 
"Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered",

but as i mentioned /IWFND/CONFIG is already registered.

So, help me in setting up connection between BAS and On premises ERP

entry.title: Restricting Storage Location in MIGO posting
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a requirement to restrict the storage location during MIGO posting for movement type 311. Kindly suggest the appropriate BAdI or user exit that can be used to implement this validation.

Note
Please do not suggest authorization checks for storage locations.

entry.title: ODATA services not found in BTP cockpit
entry.content:
Hello, i am connecting my on premises system to BAS.
1. Cloud connector setup is done and connection is fine between cloud connector and On premises system . on checking connection it says - "Backend is reachable from cloud connector".

2. Configures on premises system from BAS, entered all the variables like WebIDEUsage, WebIDEEnabled, HTML5.DynamicDestination, HTML5.Timeout

3. Getting below error when opening ON premises system from BAS - "

Could not get v2 and v4 services."
4. /IWFND/CONFIG is published in /n/IWFND/V4_ADMIN
5. Tcode- /n /IWFND/ERROR_LOG is showing error - Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered
6. While accessing url - https:///sap/opu/odata4/iwfnd/config/default/iwfnd/catalog/0002/ServiceGroups?$expand=DefaultSystem(...
getting error 
"Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered",

but as i mentioned /IWFND/CONFIG is already registered.

So, help me in setting up connection between BAS and On premises ERP

entry.title: What's the best Practice for SAP ERP Integration with Third-Party E-Invoicing Platform via APIs?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently working on a project involving SAP ERP integration with a third-party e-invoicing platform.
The solution will support both inbound and outbound e-invoices and communicate with the external platform through REST APIs.

The planned solution includes:

  • Outbound sales invoices generated in SAP and sent to the third-party platform through APIs.

  • Inbound purchase invoices received from the external platform and processed within SAP.

  • ALV reports with actions such as Send, Refresh Status, Reprocess, and View Logs.

  • Custom Z-tables for audit trails, statuses, acknowledgments, and API logs.

  • Comprehensive error handling, monitoring, and reprocessing capabilities.

 

From an ABAP architecture perspective, I would like to understand the best practices for implementing such a solution.
My question is; What's the best method or technology to implement this integration? Should I use classic REST (CL_HTTP_CLIENT) or use Odata services or ... etc?

I would appreciate hearing about real-world implementations, lessons learned, architectural recommendations, and common pitfalls to avoid.

Thank you in advance for your insights.

entry.title: Call Hana trial ABAP V4 RAP from Vscode / postman
entry.content:
I created a custom RAP V4 service in Hana trial and published it.

When calling from vscode / postman i provided the client credentials from the ABAP service(key etc.).

in Vscode i provided below details for the first call to get token.  

Auth token url

client id 

client secret

when i do get token it gets the token successfully. 

Then next call to call service metadata gives 200 but returns the login page.

 

Any clue what needs to be fixed ?

entry.title: Reprocess confirmations using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to develop a custom program.

In COFC transaction, We have the stuck postings, may be because the master data setup is missing or the rate is not defined, The stuck postings are the time confirmation record, which are currently stuck will not be processed further automatically.

 

I am updating the posting date, then need to Reprocess confirmations in my custom report.

Is this the correct FM i can using for this process BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT.

 

If yes, can you please provide any link or documentation to refer for how to fill the data before passing to this FM.

 

If this is not the correct FM for my requirement, Please suggest me a correct way to do this process.

Thanks for your support.

Praveen S

entry.title: Need Suggestions for FB60 Mass Upload (Non-PO) – BDC vs BAPI
entry.content:
Need Suggestions for FB60 Mass Upload (Non-PO) – BDC vs BAPI

 

Hi Developers,

 

I have a requirement to develop an FB60 mass Non-PO invoice uploader, where invoices are grouped based on the Reference Number.

 

I have already developed a BDC solution, and the posting process is working correctly. However, I'm facing an issue while capturing messages from the BDC execution.

 

The problem is that even when the transaction encounters an error or warning, the returned message type is sometimes 'S' (Success). Currently, I am filtering based on Message Type and Message ID to identify successfully posted documents, but this approach is not reliable in all scenarios.

 

The business users also want to see detailed error information for records that failed during upload. However, many SAP standard error messages are not user-friendly, making it difficult for end users to understand what went wrong and which field caused the issue also it has a more than 1 line error .

 

A few additional points:

 

- This is a relatively old SAP ECC 6.0 system.

- Before suggesting a BAPI solution, please note that I have already explored BAPI options.

- In my system, automatic tax code calculation is not available.

- The BAPI approach worked only for invoices without tax codes.

- I would also like to avoid manually generating the second line item that FB60 normally creates during manual entry or BDC processing.

 

My questions are:

 

1. How do you reliably identify successful and failed postings in FB60 BDC processing?

2. Is there a better way to capture and present meaningful error messages to users?

3. Has anyone successfully implemented this using a BAPI in an older ECC system, including tax handling?

4. If you have sample code or a working approach (BDC or BAPI), it would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance for your suggestions.

entry.title: Enhancement in VF11
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My requirement is to enhance transaction VF11 during the Save action. I am using user exits SDVFX001 and SDVFX008 for this enhancement. However, I am getting a short dump during include activation. Could you please help me identify the issue and suggest the correct approach.

Additionally, if SDVFX001 and SDVFX008 are not suitable for VF11 save processing, please advise on the appropriate enhancement spot or user exit. 

I am changed SUBC to 'F' from 'I' in table PROGDIR. But still I am facing this issues.

Advance Thanks.

entry.title: Sales order plant change when order created via IDOC
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023, I have a scenario where sales orders are created via IDOCs sent from an external system. In WEDI partner profile, the process code of the message type indicates IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS as the identification of process.

My requirement is to modify the line-item plant before save under certain circumstances. So, I created a logic in USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE but when the order is saved the default plant is not changes although the execution passes from the plant re-determination code.

If I create the order via VA01 then the plant is re-determined as expected and the execution flow is the same with IDOC. 

So, it seems that another standard EDI processing step runs after the exit and overwrites the plant.

How can I verify this?

Regards,

Konstantinos

entry.title: BAdI for Filter in Retail Fiori app Order Products
entry.content:
The Retail Fiori App Order Products (F0752) can be extended with custom filters using BAdI's BADI_RTST_OP_FILTER and BADI_RTST_OP_FILTERVALUE. This works fine; filters and their values appear in the app. When selecting a filter value however, the app breaks with message "Property x not found in type StoreProduct" because the filter field is not available in the metadata of the service. The app is based on SEGW service RETAILSTORE_ORDER_PRODUCT.  

The documentation off these BAdI's gives the following information:
For each new filter, a new corresponding property has to be created in the entity StoreProduct of the OData Service RETAILSTORE_ORDER_PRODUCT_SRV. The name of the property has to correspond to the ID of the filter so that the UI can map the filter value to the respective property. A new field also has to be created in the structure RTST_OP_S_STORE_PRODUCT_INCL that must be mapped to the new property in the entity.

There seems to be no BAdI in the SEGW service itself to add the property so how can the property be added in a clean way? Creating a custom service to redefine the standard service appears to be the only way to manage custom filters. Or am I overlooking an option?

entry.title: Send mail with multiple attachment after po is getting released in fexible workflow
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement where we need to trigger mail with excel and pdf attachment after all the approvers approve po in flexible workflow from my inbox

 

I'm not sure how to move forward with this. Please help
